strings.en: Yes. GPU resources are provisioned, monitored, and governed through the same Electros control plane as the rest of your infrastructure.

AtomOS provides GPU passthrough on infrastructure you control. Electros applies residency and access policies so regulated AI workloads stay compliant.
How does sovereign AI deployment work?
Atomosphere enables federated access to GPU capacity across connected providers while Electros maintains allocation and governance.
Can we federate GPU consumption across providers?
Elemento governs the infrastructure layer. It integrates with your existing ML tooling while providing unified GPU operations and policy enforcement.

strings.en: Yes. Electros coordinates primary, DR, and fallback environments across providers with unified RPO and RTO governance.
Can DR span multiple Cloud providers?
You define recovery policies per workload including jurisdiction and residency. Failover respects those constraints across connected providers.
How do sovereign recovery targets work?
Atomosquare and AtomOS enable on-premises fallback as part of your DR topology, not just another Cloud region.
Can on-premises be a DR target?
Elemento coordinates recovery orchestration and governance. It complements your backup and replication tooling by providing provider-independent failover control.
Does this replace our backup solution?
Common questions about Elemento's cross-provider dr solution
Use one control plane to coordinate primary, DR, and fallback environments across providers.
strings.it: Usa un unico control plane per coordinare ambienti primari, DR e fallback tra provider.
Disaster recovery senza dipendenza dal provider

strings.en: DR plans tied to a single Cloud vendor create recovery risk when that provider fails.
Different tools per environment make unified recovery objectives impossible to enforce.
Regulated workloads need recovery targets in specific jurisdictions, not just another region.
Coordinating failover across providers requires manual runbooks and brittle automation.
Common pain points that limit your cross-provider dr goals
strings.it: Punti critici che limitano la modernizzazione dell'infrastruttura

strings.en: Yes. Elemento treats repatriation as a policy and placement decision. Workloads move between providers while governance and operational models stay consistent.
Can we repatriate without re-architecting applications?
Atomosphere orchestrates placement across regions and providers. Electros enforces residency and jurisdiction policies throughout the migration.
How do we move workloads from US to EU providers?
Atomosquare and AtomOS provide the on-premises target. Migration preserves governance rather than requiring a new operational stack.
Can we move from public Cloud back to on-premises?
Regulatory changes, geopolitical shifts, cost optimisation, or internal sovereignty policies. Elemento lets you react with a plan instead of a re-engineering project.
Common questions about Elemento's data repatriation solution

Atomosphere federates supported service classes so you broker capacity without building each provider integration individually.
Do we need to build integrations with every upstream provider?
Atomosquare connects customer hypervisor estates into your Metacloud offering while you retain governance and operational control.
Can customers bring their own infrastructure?
Electros is licensed at the organisation level. Infrastructure consumption is billed separately and transparently—see our pricing page for the full model.
Common questions about Elemento's service providers solution
Use Elemento as your Metacloud control plane to broker third-party infrastructure and services under your own governance model.
strings.it: Usa Elemento come control plane Metacloud per intermediare infrastruttura e servizi di terze parti sotto il tuo modello di governance.

strings.it: Espandi il tuo portfolio Cloud senza costruire ogni servizio

Building every service layer delays revenue from your Cloud portfolio.

strings.en: Yes. Electros defines policies at the workload level and enforces them across public Cloud, sovereign providers, and on-premises infrastructure via Atomosphere and Atomosquare.
Can sovereignty policies apply across different cloud providers?
You set residency rules per workload. Placement and migration decisions respect those rules automatically across connected providers.
Elemento provides governance, audit visibility, and policy enforcement across infrastructure. It complements GRC platforms by operating at the workload and provider layer.
Does this replace our compliance tooling?
Electros centralises operational visibility and audit trails across all connected endpoints, regardless of underlying provider or hypervisor.
Can we audit access across hybrid environments?
Common questions about Elemento's sovereign cloud governance solution

strings.it: Valuta il tuo stato di sovranità

strings.en: Apply jurisdiction, residency, and audit policies across clouds, hypervisors, and sovereign providers from one control plane.
strings.it: Applica policy di giurisdizione, residenza e audit su Cloud, hypervisor e provider sovrani da un unico control plane.

strings.en: Regulatory requirements differ by region, workload, and data classification across your estate.
Data can drift across providers without per-workload residency enforcement.
Fragmented tooling makes it hard to prove where workloads run and who accessed them.
Separate governance models per cloud and hypervisor multiply compliance overhead.
Common pain points that limit your sovereign cloud governance goals
strings.it: Punti critici che limitano la modernizzazione dell'infrastruttura

strings.en: Elemento provides complete white-label capabilities including custom branding, APIs, and dashboards. You can deploy your own branded cloud environment with full control over the user experience and client management.
How does Elemento enable white-label cloud services?

Elemento's architecture provides complete tenant isolation at the hypervisor level, ensuring data security and compliance. Each client's environment is completely isolated while sharing underlying infrastructure efficiently.
What about multi-tenant security and isolation?
Elemento includes built-in usage tracking, billing APIs, and cost management tools that enable you to create flexible pricing models and recurring revenue streams around infrastructure services.
How does Elemento help with recurring revenue models?

Yes! Elemento provides comprehensive REST APIs and webhooks that integrate seamlessly with your existing tools, workflows, and client management systems. You can customize the entire experience to match your business processes.
Can we integrate Elemento with our existing tools and workflows?
Common questions about using Elemento for system integration

strings.en: Elemento provides better performance than VMware vSphere with modern cloud-native architecture. Our platform includes native container support, cloud integration, and API-first management that VMware lacks. We offer equivalent or better functionality at significantly lower costs.
How does Elemento compare to VMware in terms of performance and features?

Our migration process is designed to be straightforward with minimal downtime. We provide assessment tools, migration planning, and automated migration scripts. Most organizations complete the migration within 30 days with our support team guiding the process.
What is the migration process from VMware to Elemento?

Yes! Elemento provides compatibility layers and migration tools for existing VMware environments. We support common VMware APIs and provide gradual migration paths to minimize disruption to your operations.
Can Elemento integrate with existing VMware tools and workflows?

Elemento provides comprehensive support throughout the migration process including training for your team, documentation, and ongoing support. Our team works closely with you to ensure a smooth transition from VMware to our modern platform.
What about support and training for the migration?
Common questions about migrating from VMware to Elemento

strings.en: No. Elemento is designed for side-by-side operation. Govern VMware and AtomOS together, then migrate workload by workload at your own pace.
Do we need a forklift migration from VMware?
Atomosquare connects VMware and other third-party hypervisors to Electros so you apply the same policies, monitoring, and access controls across all environments.
How does Atomosquare help during VMware exit?
You keep running VMware where needed while gradually shifting execution to AtomOS. No forced rip-and-replace timeline.
What happens to existing VMware investments during transition?
Electros provides an organisation-wide control plane that is not tied to a single hypervisor or cloud. You gain portability instead of trading one lock-in for another.
How is this different from switching to another proprietary hypervisor?
Common questions about Elemento's vmware exit solution

strings.it: Avvia una valutazione di uscita da VMware

strings.en: Govern VMware and AtomOS side by side. Migrate workload by workload with no forklift, no downtime windows, and no new dependency cycle.
strings.it: Gestisci VMware e AtomOS fianco a fianco. Migra workload per workload senza forklift, senza finestre di downtime e senza un nuovo ciclo di dipendenza.

strings.en: Exit VMware Without Entering Another Lock-In
strings.it: Uscire da VMware senza un nuovo lock-in

strings.en: Replacing VMware with another hypervisor addresses licensing but not the underlying dependency model.
Big-bang migrations create downtime windows and operational risk across critical workloads.
Switching vendors without a governance layer simply restarts the dependency cycle elsewhere.
Running mixed hypervisors without a unified control plane multiplies operational overhead.
Common pain points that limit your vmware exit goals

strings.en: Elemento allowed us to move away from a rigid appliance-based system to a flexible Linux and hybrid cloud architecture. We now have disaster recovery without vendor lock-in.
strings.it: Elemento ci ha permesso di passare da un sistema rigido basato su appliance a un'architettura Linux flessibile e cloud ibrida. Ora disponiamo del ripristino di emergenza senza vincoli con i fornitori.

strings.en: With Elemento, we achieved a redundant local cluster and a fully automated off-site disaster recovery system. This ensures uninterrupted operations for our mission-critical workloads.
strings.it: Con Elemento, abbiamo ottenuto un cluster locale ridondante e un sistema di disaster recovery off-site completamente automatizzato. Ciò garantisce operazioni ininterrotte per i nostri carichi di lavoro mission-critical.

strings.en: Elemento gave us enterprise-grade resilience with a redundant NAS locally and secure backups in the cloud. We maintain full data sovereignty while ensuring business continuity.
strings.it: Elemento ci ha offerto resilienza di livello aziendale con un NAS ridondante a livello locale e backup sicuri nel cloud. Manteniamo la piena sovranità dei dati garantendo al contempo la continuità aziendale.

strings.en: Our multiple dental practices now run on a unified, secure data center for ERP, CRM, and x-ray management. This provides consistent uptime and scalability across all our clinics.
strings.it: I nostri numerosi studi dentistici ora funzionano su un data center unificato e sicuro per la gestione ERP, CRM e dei raggi X. Ciò garantisce tempi di attività e scalabilità costanti in tutte le nostre cliniche.

strings.en: Elemento's redundant cluster keeps our ERP always online, even in a rural area with limited connectivity. The automatic failover ensures we never lose critical business operations.
strings.it: Il cluster ridondante di Elemento mantiene il nostro ERP sempre online, anche in un'area rurale con connettività limitata. Il failover automatico garantisce di non perdere mai le operazioni aziendali critiche.

strings.en: Elemento is the backbone technology enabling the first true federation of European Cloud Providers. It unlocks cross-border interoperability without sacrificing sovereignty.
strings.it: Elemento è la tecnologia backbone che consente la prima vera federazione di Cloud Provider europei. Sblocca l’interoperabilità transfrontaliera senza sacrificare la sovranità.

strings.en: With a foundation in Nuclear and Subnuclear Physics, I've channeled my scientific rigor into creating robust, scalable cloud solutions.
strings.it: Con una formazione in fisica nucleare e subnucleare, ho incanalato il mio rigore scientifico nella creazione di soluzioni cloud robuste e scalabili.

strings.en: Curious by nature, I Love coding and data mining. | I studied Complex Systems and now I am leading the tech team to simplify the clouds.
strings.it: Curioso per natura, amo la programmazione e il data mining. | Ho studiato Sistemi Complessi e ora sto guidando il team tecnico per semplificare i cloud.

strings.en: Physicist, Ph.D. in Complex Systems for Life Sciences
strings.it: Fisico, Ph.D. in Sistemi complessi per le scienze della vita

strings.en: R&D Developer at Elemento Cloud and Computer Science student passionate about Linux systems and virtualization technologies. Always eager to explore new tech challenges and learn as much as possible!
strings.it: Sviluppatore R&D presso Elemento Cloud e studente di Informatica appassionato di sistemi Linux e tecnologie di virtualizzazione. Sempre desideroso di esplorare nuove sfide tecnologiche e imparare il più possibile!
Studente del Master in Cybersecurity presso PoliTO

strings.en: MSc Cloud Engineer @PoliTO, passionate about computer science, innovation, and economics. Always seeking new challenges and growth opportunities.
strings.it: Master in Cloud Engineer @PoliTO, appassionato di informatica, innovazione ed economia. Sempre alla ricerca di nuove sfide e opportunità di crescita.

strings.en: Engineer and computer science teacher. Passionate about mountains, travel and innovation. Always curious, always learning
strings.it: Ingegnere e docente di informatica. Appassionata di montagna, viaggi e innovazione. Sempre curiosa, sempre in apprendimento

strings.en: I am a computer science student who loves music and low-level programming. I've been fortunate to work with Elemento since 2023.
strings.it: Sono uno studente di informatica che ama la musica e la programmazione di basso livello. Ho avuto la fortuna di lavorare con Elemento dal 2023.

strings.en: IT Student and programmer that enjoys photography in his free time.
strings.it: Studente di informatica e programmatore che ama la fotografia nel tempo libero.

strings.en: Passionate about books and everything related to computer science. I particularly enjoy studying algorithms, multimedia formats, and network protocols.
strings.it: Appassionato di libri e di tutto ciò che riguarda l'informatica. Mi piace particolarmente studiare algoritmi, formati multimediali e protocolli di rete.

strings.en: MSc Cybersecurity student @PoliTO, passionate about anything that works autonomously. If I don't understand how it works, I simply take it apart. Yes, I'm curious too!
strings.it: Studente magistrale in Cybersecurity @PoliTO, appassionato di tutto ciò che funziona in autonomia. Se non capisco come funziona, lo smonto semplicemente. Sì, sono curioso anch'io!

strings.en: Imaginative and curious about how things work and how they’re thought, I’m passionate about nature, video games and photography.
strings.it: Fantasiosa e curiosa di come funzionano le cose e di come vengono pensate, sono appassionata di natura, videogiochi e fotografia.

strings.en: I'm one of the lucky few who turned their passion into a career. I started out as a software developer, and along the way, I fell in love with the more tangible side of IT: hardware infrastructure.
strings.it: Sono uno dei pochi fortunati che ha trasformato la propria passione in una carriera. Ho iniziato come sviluppatore di software e, lungo il percorso, mi sono innamorato del lato più tangibile dell'IT: l'infrastruttura hardware.

strings.en: With experience in M&A, corporate strategy and venture building, and a background in economics, entrepreneurship and innovation. I bridge finance and tech at Elemento.
strings.it: Con esperienza in fusioni e acquisizioni, strategia aziendale e venture building, e un background in economia, imprenditorialità e innovazione. Collego finanza e tecnologia presso Elemento.

strings.en: MSc Economics and Management of Innovation and Technology @ Bocconi University
strings.it: Master in Economia e Management dell'Innovazione e della Tecnologia @ Università Bocconi

strings.en: CMO at Elemento Cloud, bridging strategy, technology, and creativity. I am always looking for the next big thing in digital communication. I focus on humanizing and translating our tech, into impactful communication. My mission is to make our cloud solutions feel as intuitive and accessible as they are powerful.
strings.it: CMO presso Elemento Cloud, unisco strategia, tecnologia e creatività. Sono sempre alla ricerca della prossima grande novità nella comunicazione digitale. Mi concentro sulla traduzione della nostra tecnologia in una comunicazione di grande impatto. La mia missione è rendere le nostre soluzioni cloud tanto intuitive e accessibili quanto potenti.

strings.en: Started with chemistry, ventured into physics, now a developer. Turns out, I was just moving from one puzzle to the next. Always curious, always building, always learning.
strings.it: Ho iniziato con la chimica, mi sono avventurato nella fisica, ora sono uno sviluppatore. Si scopre che stavo semplicemente passando da un puzzle all'altro. Sempre curioso, sempre costruendo, sempre imparando.

strings.en: Shaping visuals and identities always seeking the key to reinterpreting the ordinary
strings.it: Modellare immagini e identità cercando sempre la chiave per reinterpretare l'ordinario

strings.en: Event Manager at Elemento Cloud, I am responsible for the organization and execution of our events. I am a musicologist, musician, and educator with a passion for bold ideas, social media, and all things fuchsia.
strings.it: Event Manager presso Elemento Cloud, sono responsabile dell'organizzazione e dell'esecuzione dei nostri eventi. Sono musicologa, musicista ed educatrice con una passione per le idee audaci, i social media e tutto ciò che è fucsia.

strings.en: Passionate programmer with a love for computer science and video games, driven by the desire to understand how things work
strings.it: Programmatore appassionato con la passione per l'informatica e i videogiochi, spinto dal desiderio di capire come funzionano le cose

strings.en: Software Engineer specialized in artificial intelligence and data. Interested in data processing and acquisition, model optimization, and AI integration.
strings.it: Ingegnere informatico specializzato in intelligenza artificiale e dati. Interessato all'elaborazione e all'acquisizione dei dati, all'ottimizzazione dei modelli e all'integrazione dell'intelligenza artificiale.
